ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – 12:00 – 02:00 UTC
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Please be advised that our corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance from 12:00 UTC on Friday to 02:00 UTC Saturday. During this window, access to the VPN will be unavailable.

If you need to connect to our internal resources, please use the alternative secure portal at <URL>.

We apologize for any inconvenience and appreciate your cooperation.

Thank you,
IT Support

spam.subject: URGENT: Zoom Meeting Requires Your Immediate Action
spam.body:
Hello,

You have been invited to a critical Zoom meeting titled “Quarterly Review – Confidential”. Please join immediately to review the agenda and confirm your attendance. Failure to join may result in missing important updates.

Click the link below to join the meeting:

<URL>

Meeting ID: 123‑456‑7890
Password: Secure123

If you did not request this meeting, please ignore this message.

Thank you,
Zoom Support
